plays.comments: Two ticks away from death, 6 tiles left, Normal difficulty.
Eli could have ended the game but was nice to his girlfriend and then lost.... later.... by 2 points.
Eli as Tequila Joe died first and became the vengeful ghost.

Crazy close game, even Adam as Renegade almost won.

Lauren was able to stay alive by rolling health for an absurd amount of turns.

First play through of game 3! Upgraded heroes is sweet and new spell chips.

Lauren as Hermione was freaking dealing like 6 damage every turn.
Normal - nearly got into desert level 6.

Longest game I’ve played in my entire life, we almost lost... good lord.

Scenario was Feast for Umordhoth.

I somewhat wonder if we played it incorrectly?

Playing Game 4 - yay new dice.

Crushed it - need to start adding dark marks to increase difficulty.

Playing game 5 for the first time. We added two dark marks to make the game harder.

We ended the game only having one dark mark to spare on the last location.

Lauren saved the game twice by removing 3 dark marks in a single turn... TWICE.
Lost game 4 because of a brutal Lucius Malfoy and Peter Pettigrew combo.

Playing game 6!! We all roleplayed well :).

Got freaking wrecked, game 6 is hard bro.
Not anything special, just a random game.
Lauren and I obliterated the last game. I ended with 29 cards, Lauren ended with 33. We never got past location one.
We played a game not keeping score.
First play on the new big box set with Cathedrals. Played without Farmers.
Playing Game 4 with all of the Hogwarts cards.
Actually unbelievable win. David definitely should have died. Divine intervention is the only explanation.
I got so many points, but couldn’t escape the insane amount of dragon attacks.
Playing with just traders and builders.

First play through! Took a lot of thinking, ended up working by advancing the terror enough so that they left if there wasn’t cities and immediately won.

Need to manage the explorers that will BUILD next towards the end of the game.

playerScores.role: Vital Strength Of The Earth／Lightning's Swift Strike
Vital Strength Of The Earth／River Surges In Sunlight

plays.comments: If we drew one more waters rise we would lose.

Playing Box 1 in the first expansion!

Luna w Transfiguration, Neville w Care of Magical Creatures.
Playing with Traders and Builders and Inn and Cathedrals.
Got wrecked in drowned tunnels in Innsmouth Conspiracy. Restarting.
While drunk: “sorority girls who is off her rocker but shows up to class on time” for the scale “Unstable Stable”
Fricking boat design - game bad - bad
Azathoth - LITERALLY ONLY ONE MYTHOS CARD LEFT
Spencer noted for this game that if you go first you lose, but Lauren got second soooooo
Sus win - called it a tie bc Spencer won but Eli also had the win con
BIG WIN EZ GAME FOR BABIES
We played with the queen and white rabbit cards.

playerScores.role: A Spread Of Rampant Green／Ember-Eyed Behemoth

plays.comments: Spencer and Riley insta merc’d smh
Eli and Lauren technically shared victory w/ the most cats and buttons
TIE - bc one player (who will remain unnamed but is Spencer) played with 19 tokens instead of 14
